fragility_points: A single upward wick above 90 would immediately invalidate the below-market variant view.
This estimate is highly sensitive to remaining time in the market window.
Exchange-specific chart/API presentation nuances could matter at the exact threshold if a borderline wick occurs.
key_assumptions: A near-touch regime that has not yet printed 90 on Binance should still be treated as materially uncertain.
Binance API minute highs are an adequate proxy for pre-settlement assessment of whether the event has already happened.
No major hidden catalyst or abrupt risk-off move dominates the remaining window.
main_logical_chain: The market implies 74% Yes because SOL is already trading near the $90 threshold.
The contract resolves only from Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute highs, so direct Binance evidence matters more than generalized bullish commentary.
Direct Binance checks show a peak of 89.15 rather than a qualifying 90+ print.
That keeps Yes favored because the remaining gap is small, but it leaves enough unresolved completion risk to justify a probability below market.
main_thesis: Yes is still favored, but the market likely overprices a SOL $90 touch because direct Binance evidence shows a near-miss regime rather than a completed or obviously imminent threshold break.
quote_anchors: any Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute candle ... High of 90.00 or greater
source_quality_view: Low source-of-truth ambiguity and strong venue-specific evidence, with medium independence because contextual cross-checks cannot replace Binance for settlement.
strongest_disconfirmers: No verified Binance 1-minute high of 90.00 or greater was found in the checked contract window.
Repeated highs below 90 suggest near-touch is not equivalent to completion in a short-dated threshold market.
Time decay and possible risk-off moves can still prevent a final touch despite proximity.
strongest_supports: Binance 24h ticker showed lastPrice 88.91 and highPrice 89.15, leaving only a small gap to the strike.
Full Binance minute-window pull found a max high of 89.15, confirming the market has already approached the threshold closely.
CoinGecko contextual data also showed a high-88s regime, supporting that SOL is broadly trading near the target.
timing_relevance: Very high: this is a short-dated touch market where one additional upward impulse before April 19 can settle the contract.
unresolved_ambiguities: How much meaningful time remains after this run for another test of 90.
Whether Binance chart display conventions could matter if a 90-area wick occurs right at the boundary.
How much broader crypto momentum persists into the remainder of the window.
what_would_change_view: I would move up if Binance prints fresh highs above 89.5 or any qualifying 90+ minute high; I would move down if SOL retreats into the mid-80s or repeatedly fails below 89 as time decays.
